Function.Inference: A 4-bar intro establishing the tempo, ending with a double barline.
The main loop body, starting with a Segno and ending with a D.S. loop instruction.

Section.Inference: Introductory phrase establishing the surf rock rhythm and mood.
Main melody introduced with a relatively light accompaniment.
Repeat of the main melody featuring fuller instrumentation and thicker chords.
Contrasting section with a new melody, building tension towards the D.S. loop point.
